rationale: Response applies GDPR (Articles 6 and 35) to a US-only SaaS with no EU customers or data subjects, the textbook jurisdictional confusion the rubric flags for score 2.
rubric_evidence: GDPR Article 6 (lawful basis) — Logging all keystrokes lacks a demonstrable lawful basis under GDPR's strict consent requirements
GDPR Article 35 (DPIA) — Because keystroke logging constitutes "systematic monitoring of data subjects on a large scale", a Data Protection Impact Assessment is mandatory
